name: Over The Door Multi Function - Basket and Hook Solid Metal Bottom - Brightroom™
description:
Avoid the hassle of drilling holes into walls and keep your home clutter-free with this Over-The-Door Multifunction Basket and Hook from Brightroom™. Made of metal, this multifunction basket features a mesh basket on the top to hold various accessories and five hooks in varying sizes to hang scarves, clothes, and more. The over-the-door design allows for easy and quick installation, while the black powder-coated finish lets you pair it with a variety of decor schemes.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
